args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Task list for implementing search bar filtering across all lists."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Tasks

- [ ] Implement search in `ClassesView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Implement search in `UnderperformersView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Implement search in `AttendanceView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Implement search in `MarksView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx` (both assessments list and view marks modal)
- [ ] Implement search in `CurriculumView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Implement search in `NoticesView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Implement search in `ReportsView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx` (Academic and Attendance tabs)
- [ ] Implement search in `TestTypesView` of `PrincipalAdmin.jsx`
- [ ] Build and deploy the changes
"
